scripts.test: nub run --filter '@unrulysystems/rn-playwright-driver' test && nub run --filter '@unrulysystems/rn-playwright-driver-runner' test && nub run --filter '@unrulysystems/rn-playwright-driver-instrumentation-companion' test && nub run --filter '@unrulysystems/rn-playwright-driver-xctest-companion' test
scripts.typecheck: nub run --filter '@unrulysystems/rn-playwright-driver' typecheck && nub run --filter '@unrulysystems/rn-playwright-driver-runner' typecheck && nub run --filter '@unrulysystems/rn-driver-lifecycle' typecheck && nub run --filter '@unrulysystems/rn-driver-touch' typecheck && nub run --filter '@unrulysystems/rn-driver-screenshot' typecheck && nub run --filter '@unrulysystems/rn-driver-shared-types' typecheck && nub run --filter '@unrulysystems/rn-driver-view-tree' typecheck && nub run --filter 'examples-basic-app' typecheck
scripts.knip: nub run --filter '@unrulysystems/rn-playwright-driver' knip && nub run --filter '@unrulysystems/rn-playwright-driver-runner' knip && nub run --filter 'examples-basic-app' knip
scripts.cpd: nub run --filter '@unrulysystems/rn-playwright-driver' cpd && nub run --filter '@unrulysystems/rn-playwright-driver-runner' cpd && nub run --filter 'examples-basic-app' cpd
scripts.check: nub run typecheck && nub run lint && nub run format:check && nub run test
